152‚Üí    private fun getInitialTimeFrame(timeframe: StatsTimeframe?, launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?): StatsSection? {
153‚Üí        if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.LINK) {
154‚Üí            setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab(timeframe)

156‚Üí
157‚Üí        return when (timeframe) {
158‚Üí            StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC -> StatsSection.TRAFFIC
159‚Üí            StatsTimeframe.INSIGHTS -> StatsSection.INSIGHTS
160‚Üí            StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS -> StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS
161‚Üí            DAY -> StatsSection.DAYS
162‚Üí            WEEK -> StatsSection.WEEKS
163‚Üí            MONTH -> StatsSection.MONTHS
164‚Üí            YEAR -> StatsSection.YEARS
165‚Üí            else -> null
166‚Üí        }
167‚Üí    }

171‚Üí            DAY -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.DAYS)
172‚Üí            WEEK -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.WEEKS)
173‚Üí            MONTH -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.MONTHS)
174‚Üí            YEAR -> selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(StatsGranularity.YEARS)
175‚Üí            else -> { /* Do nothing */ }
176‚Üí        }
177‚Üí    }

179‚Üí    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
180‚Üí    fun start(
181‚Üí        localSiteId: Int,
182‚Üí        launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?,
183‚Üí        initialSection: StatsSection?,
184‚Üí        initialSelectedPeriod: String?,
185‚Üí        restart: Boolean,
186‚Üí        notificationType: NotificationType?,
187‚Üí        granularity: StatsGranularity? = null
188‚Üí    ) {
189‚Üí        if (restart) {
190‚Üí            selectedDateProvider.clear()
191‚Üí        }
192‚Üí        // Check if VM is not already initialized
193‚Üí        if (!isInitialized || restart) {
194‚Üí            isInitialized = true
195‚Üí
196‚Üí            analyticsTracker.trackStatsAccessed(
197‚Üí                site = statsSiteProvider.siteModel,
198‚Üí                tapSource = launchedFrom?.value ?: ""
199‚Üí            )
200‚Üí
201‚Üí            initialSection?.let {
202‚Üí                statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(it)
203‚Üí
204‚Üí                val trafficGranularity = it.toStatsGranularity()
205‚Üí                if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && trafficGranularity != null) {
206‚Üí                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(trafficGranularity)
207‚Üí                }
208‚Üí            }
209‚Üí            granularity?.let {
210‚Üí                if (it != selectedTrafficGranularityManager.getSelectedTrafficGranularity()) {
211‚Üí                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(it)
212‚Üí                }
213‚Üí            }
214‚Üí            updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()
215‚Üí            trackSectionSelected(statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection())
216‚Üí
217‚Üí            val initialGranularity = granularity ?: initialSection?.toStatsGranularity()
218‚Üí            if (initialGranularity != null && initialSelectedPeriod != null) {
219‚Üí                selectedDateProvider.setInitialSelectedPeriod(initialGranularity, initialSelectedPeriod)
220‚Üí            }
221‚Üí
222‚Üí            if (launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.WIDGET) {
223‚Üí                analyticsTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.STATS_WIDGET_TAPPED, statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
224‚Üí            }
225‚Üí
226‚Üí            if (notificationType != null) {
227‚Üí                notificationsTracker.trackTappedNotification(notificationType)
228‚Üí            }
229‚Üí        }
230‚Üí
231‚Üí        _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsEnabledViewUiModel())
232‚Üí
233‚Üí        val siteChanged = statsSiteProvider.start(localSiteId)
234‚Üí        if (!isStatsModuleEnabled()) {
235‚Üí            _statsModuleUiModel.value = Event(buildShowStatsDisabledViewUiModel())
236‚Üí        } else {
237‚Üí            if (restart && siteChanged) {
238‚Üí                launch {
239‚Üí                    listUseCases.forEach { useCase ->
240‚Üí                        useCase.value.onCleared()
241‚Üí                        useCase.value.refreshData(true)
242‚Üí                    }
243‚Üí                }
244‚Üí            }
245‚Üí        }
246‚Üí
247‚Üí        if (BuildConfig.IS_JETPACK_APP) {
248‚Üí            updateRevampedInsights()
249‚Üí        }
250‚Üí
251‚Üí        if (jetpackBrandingUtils.shouldShowJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()) showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
252‚Üí
253‚Üí        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.shouldShowFeatureSpecificJetpackOverlay(STATS))
254‚Üí            showJetpackOverlay()
255‚Üí    }

257‚Üí    private fun updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig() {
258‚Üí        if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
259‚Üí            val selectedSection = statsSectionManager.getSelectedSection()
260‚Üí            val isSelectedSectionRemoved = selectedSection == StatsSection.DAYS ||
261‚Üí                    selectedSection == StatsSection.WEEKS ||
262‚Üí                    selectedSection == StatsSection.MONTHS ||
263‚Üí                    selectedSection == StatsSection.YEARS
264‚Üí
265‚Üí            if (isSelectedSectionRemoved) {
266‚Üí                // statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig has just been enabled. Update the cached selected section.
267‚Üí                statsSectionManager.setSelectedSection(StatsSection.TRAFFIC)
268‚Üí            }
269‚Üí        }
270‚Üí    }

280‚Üí    private fun updateRevampedInsights() {
281‚Üí        val insightsUseCase = listUseCases[StatsSection.INSIGHTS]
282‚Üí        insightsUseCase?.launch(defaultDispatcher) {
283‚Üí            val insightTypes = statsStore.getAddedInsights(statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
284‚Üí            if (insightTypes.containsAll(DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)) { // means not upgraded to new insights
285‚Üí                // The new set of default cards is added at the top of their list and preserve their additions
286‚Üí                val addedInsightTypes = insightTypes - DEFAULT_INSIGHTS.toSet()
287‚Üí                val updateInsightTypes: MutableSet<InsightType> = mutableSetOf()
288‚Üí                updateInsightTypes.addAll(JETPACK_DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)
289‚Üí                updateInsightTypes.addAll(addedInsightTypes)
290‚Üí                statsStore.updateTypes(statsSiteProvider.siteModel, updateInsightTypes.toList())
291‚Üí                insightsUseCase.loadData()
292‚Üí            }
293‚Üí        }
294‚Üí    }

Now I have a clear picture. The issue requires adding deep link support for:
1. **Subscribers tab** - `subscribers` as a timeframe in the URL like `https://wordpress.com/stats/subscribers/$site`
2. **Traffic tab** with granularity - `traffic` as a timeframe, possibly with granularity like `https://wordpress.com/stats/traffic/$site`

Let me check how the `getInitialTimeFrame` method in `StatsViewModel` handles TRAFFIC and SUBSCRIBERS already, and also check how the deep link converts timeframe strings:

Looking at the current `StatsLinkHandler.toStatsTimeframe()`:
- `day`, `week`, `month`, `year`, `insights` are supported
- **Missing**: `subscribers` and `traffic` are NOT supported

And looking at `StatsTimeframe` enum, it already has `TRAFFIC` and `SUBSCRIBERS` values.

The `StatsViewModel.getInitialTimeFrame()` already handles `StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC` ‚Üí `StatsSection.TRAFFIC` and `StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS` ‚Üí `StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS`.

So the fix is to add `subscribers` and `traffic` to the `toStatsTimeframe()` mapping in `StatsLinkHandler.kt`. Let me also check if there's anything needed for the `setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab` which handles DAY/WEEK/MONTH/YEAR granularity when traffic tab is used via deep link.

Let me also check how the deep links navigate for traffic with granularity. Looking at the URL pattern: `https://wordpress.com/stats/$timeframe/$site`. For traffic with granularity, the URL would be like `https://wordpress.com/stats/day/$site` which should navigate to the Traffic tab with day granularity selected (when the traffic tab feature is enabled). This is already handled by `setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab` in `StatsViewModel`.

But looking more closely, when the traffic tab feature is enabled and someone sends `day`, `week`, `month`, `year` - the `getInitialTimeFrame` maps these to DAYS, WEEKS, MONTHS, YEARS sections. But `setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab` sets the traffic granularity. However, the section is still set to DAYS/WEEKS/MONTHS/YEARS - and then `updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig` in the `start` method remaps those to TRAFFIC.

So for the Traffic tab with granularity, the existing day/week/month/year links should work with the traffic tab feature enabled. But we need to add:
1. `"subscribers"` ‚Üí `StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS` 
2. `"traffic"` ‚Üí `StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC`

The change is clean. Now let me also verify the full chain of deep link handling to make sure the `StatsViewModel.getInitialTimeFrame` properly handles the new timeframes:

Looking back at the `StatsViewModel.getInitialTimeFrame()`:

```kotlin
private fun getInitialTimeFrame(timeframe: StatsTimeframe?, launchedFrom: StatsLaunchedFrom?): StatsSection? {
    if (statsTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig.isEnabled() && launchedFrom == StatsLaunchedFrom.LINK) {
        setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab(timeframe)
    }

    return when (timeframe) {
        StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC -> StatsSection.TRAFFIC
        StatsTimeframe.INSIGHTS -> StatsSection.INSIGHTS
        StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS -> StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS
        DAY -> StatsSection.DAYS
        WEEK -> StatsSection.WEEKS
        MONTH -> StatsSection.MONTHS
        YEAR -> StatsSection.YEARS
        else -> null
    }
}
```

This already maps:
- `StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC` ‚Üí `StatsSection.TRAFFIC` ‚úÖ
- `StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS` ‚Üí `StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS` ‚úÖ

And the `setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab` already handles mapping DAY/WEEK/MONTH/YEAR to appropriate traffic granularity when the traffic tab feature is enabled.

The `DeepLinkNavigator` also already handles `OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe`, `OpenStatsForSite`, `OpenStatsForTimeframe` with the appropriate `StatsTimeframe` values.

Let me also verify the `StatsFragment` properly handles the TRAFFIC and SUBSCRIBERS sections in `handleSelectedSectionWithTrafficTab`:

val position = when (selectedSection) {

updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()

The `updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()` converts DAYS/WEEKS/MONTHS/YEARS ‚Üí TRAFFIC when the traffic tab feature is enabled. So the deep link `day`/`week`/`month`/`year` with the traffic feature enabled will:

The change is complete. Let me summarize what was done:

## Summary

The issue required adding deep link support for:
1. **Deep link to Subscribers tab** - URLs like `https://wordpress.com/stats/subscribers/$site`
2. **Deep link to Traffic tab** - URLs like `https://wordpress.com/stats/traffic/$site`

### Root Cause
The `StatsLinkHandler.toStatsTimeframe()` method only mapped `"day"`, `"week"`, `"month"`, `"year"`, and `"insights"` string values from deep link URLs to their corresponding `StatsTimeframe` enum values. It was missing mappings for `"subscribers"` and `"traffic"`.

### Fix
Added two new mappings in `StatsLinkHandler.kt`:
- `"subscribers"` ‚Üí `StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS`
- `"traffic"` ‚Üí `StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC`

### Why this is sufficient
The rest of the deep link chain was already properly set up:
- `StatsTimeframe` enum already had `SUBSCRIBERS` and `TRAFFIC` values
- `StatsViewModel.getInitialTimeFrame()` already maps `StatsTimeframe.SUBSCRIBERS` ‚Üí `StatsSection.SUBSCRIBERS` and `StatsTimeframe.TRAFFIC` ‚Üí `StatsSection.TRAFFIC`
- `StatsFragment.handleSelectedSectionWithTrafficTab()` already positions the pager correctly for TRAFFIC (position 0) and SUBSCRIBERS (position 2)
- For traffic with granularity (day/week/month/year URLs when traffic tab is enabled), `setupDeeplinkForTrafficTab()` and `updateSelectedSectionByTrafficSubscribersTabFeatureConfig()` already handle converting those to the Traffic tab with the correct granularity selected

 36‚Üíclass DeepLinkNavigator
 37‚Üí@Inject constructor(private val activityNavigator: ActivityNavigator) {
 38‚Üí    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
 39‚Üí    fun handleNavigationAction(navigateAction: NavigateAction, activity: AppCompatActivity) {
 40‚Üí        when (navigateAction) {
 41‚Üí            LoginForResult -> ActivityLauncher.loginForDeeplink(activity)
 42‚Üí            StartCreateSiteFlow -> {
 43‚Üí                ActivityLauncher.showMainActivityAndSiteCreationActivity(activity, DEEP_LINK)
 44‚Üí            }
 45‚Üí            ShowSignInFlow -> ActivityLauncher.showSignInForResultWpComOnly(activity)
 46‚Üí            OpenEditor -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorInNewStack(activity)
 47‚Üí            is OpenEditorForSite -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForSiteInNewStack(
 48‚Üí                activity,
 49‚Üí                navigateAction.site
 50‚Üí            )
 51‚Üí            is OpenInBrowser -> {
 52‚Üí                val browserIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 53‚Üí                activity.startActivity(browserIntent)
 54‚Üí            }
 55‚Üí            is OpenEditorForPost -> ActivityLauncher.openEditorForPostInNewStack(
 56‚Üí                activity,
 57‚Üí                navigateAction.site,
 58‚Üí                navigateAction.postId
 59‚Üí            )
 60‚Üí            OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(activity)
 61‚Üí            is OpenStatsForTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsForTimeframeInNewStack(
 62‚Üí                activity,
 63‚Üí                navigateAction.statsTimeframe
 64‚Üí            )
 65‚Üí
 66‚Üí            is OpenStatsForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(
 67‚Üí                activity,
 68‚Üí                navigateAction.site,
 69‚Üí                StatsLaunchedFrom.LINK
 70‚Üí            )
 71‚Üí
 72‚Üí            is OpenStatsForSiteAndTimeframe -> ActivityLauncher.viewStatsInNewStack(
 73‚Üí                activity,
 74‚Üí                navigateAction.site,
 75‚Üí                navigateAction.statsTimeframe,
 76‚Üí                StatsLaunchedFrom.LINK
 77‚Üí            )
 78‚Üí
 79‚Üí            OpenReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderInNewStack(activity)
 80‚Üí            is OpenInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewPostDeeplinkInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri.uri)
 81‚Üí            is ViewPostInReader -> ActivityLauncher.viewReaderPostDetailInNewStack(
 82‚Üí                activity,
 83‚Üí                navigateAction.blogId,
 84‚Üí                navigateAction.postId,
 85‚Üí                navigateAction.uri.uri
 86‚Üí            )
 87‚Üí            OpenNotifications -> ActivityLauncher.viewNotificationsInNewStack(activity)
 88‚Üí            is OpenPagesForSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 89‚Üí            OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewPagesInNewStack(activity)
 90‚Üí            is OpenQRCodeAuthFlow -> ActivityLauncher.startQRCodeAuthFlowInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.uri)
 91‚Üí            OpenMySite -> ActivityLauncher.viewMySiteInNewStack(activity)
 92‚Üí            OpenLoginPrologue -> ActivityLauncher.showLoginPrologue(activity)
 93‚Üí            is OpenJetpackForDeepLink ->
 94‚Üí                ActivityLauncher.openJetpackForDeeplink(activity, navigateAction.action, navigateAction.uri)
 95‚Üí            is NavigateAction.OpenJetpackStaticPosterView ->
 96‚Üí                ActivityLauncher.showJetpackStaticPoster(activity)
 97‚Üí            is NavigateAction.OpenMediaForSite -> activityNavigator.openMediaInNewStack(activity, navigateAction.site)
 98‚Üí            NavigateAction.OpenMedia -> activityNavigator.openMediaInNewStack(activity)
 99‚Üí            is NavigateAction.OpenMediaPickerForSite -> activityNavigator.openMediaPickerInNewStack(
100‚Üí                activity,
101‚Üí                navigateAction.site
102‚Üí            )
103‚Üí            NavigateAction.DomainManagement -> ActivityLauncher.openDomainManagement(activity)
104‚Üí            is NavigateAction.OpenSiteMonitoringForSite -> activityNavigator.openSiteMonitoringInNewStack(
105‚Üí                activity,
106‚Üí                navigateAction.site,
107‚Üí                navigateAction.siteMonitorType
108‚Üí            )
109‚Üí            is NavigateAction.OpenMySiteWithMessage -> activityNavigator.openMySiteWithMessageInNewStack(
110‚Üí                activity,
111‚Üí                navigateAction.message
112‚Üí            )
113‚Üí        }
114‚Üí        if (navigateAction != LoginForResult) {
115‚Üí            activity.finish()
116‚Üí        }
117‚Üí    }

206‚Üí                    selectedTrafficGranularityManager.setSelectedTrafficGranularity(trafficGranularity)

280‚Üí    private fun updateRevampedInsights() {
281‚Üí        val insightsUseCase = listUseCases[StatsSection.INSIGHTS]
282‚Üí        insightsUseCase?.launch(defaultDispatcher) {
283‚Üí            val insightTypes = statsStore.getAddedInsights(statsSiteProvider.siteModel)
284‚Üí            if (insightTypes.containsAll(DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)) { // means not upgraded to new insights
285‚Üí                // The new set of default cards is added at the top of their list and preserve their additions
286‚Üí                val addedInsightTypes = insightTypes - DEFAULT_INSIGHTS.toSet()
287‚Üí                val updateInsightTypes: MutableSet<InsightType> = mutableSetOf()
288‚Üí                updateInsightTypes.addAll(JETPACK_DEFAULT_INSIGHTS)
289‚Üí                updateInsightTypes.addAll(addedInsightTypes)
290‚Üí                statsStore.updateTypes(statsSiteProvider.siteModel, updateInsightTypes.toList())
291‚Üí                insightsUseCase.loadData()
292‚Üí            }
293‚Üí        }
